observations.detail: Goodsprings exterior geometry, terrain, props, authored buildings, actors, and traversal render continuously across several walks.
A textured authored sky with moving-looking cloud layers is visible throughout sampled exterior segments; no missing-sky frame was observed.
Third-person traversal, camera control, crosshair, and HUD render; player equipment and presentation remain visibly incomplete.
Human actors, a dog, bighorners, and a securitron render and occupy the world; pose, turn, and reaction fidelity are not established by this recording.
The run enters and exits Chet's store, the Prospector Saloon, and Doc Mitchell's house through working door/cell transitions, including authored loading screens.
Chet's store, the Prospector Saloon, and Doc Mitchell's house render with their authored meshes, textures, clutter, lighting, and fixtures.
Multi-topic dialogue UI and authored response text are exercised with Chet, Easy Pete, Sunny Smiles, and Doc Mitchell; presentation is visibly non-retail and condition/quest mutation is not proven.
Radios, bar fixtures, bathroom fixtures, and a jukebox are present and targetable, but this recording does not prove their complete activation behavior.

visibleGaps: Player appears in underwear/default equipment for the whole recording.
Dialogue layout and camera presentation do not match retail Fallout: New Vegas.
Actor turning, facial motion, pose settling, and reactions remain visibly incomplete or unproven.
No combat, hit reaction, VATS, inventory, Pip-Boy, quest-log progression, crafting, terminal, save, reload, or death loop is demonstrated.
Audio stream exists, but voice, lip synchronization, radio, music, and spatial-audio behavior were not audited.
The recording contains no paired retail capture, immutable engine binary/profile/save hashes, or normal-exit proof.
conclusion: This video proves a substantial playable Goodsprings vertical slice. It is real bounded runtime evidence, not zero work, but it cannot close a retail-parity capability case by itself.
